title: Swift recovery of stolen vehicle in Knysna
description: KNYSNA NEWS - A stolen vehicle was...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - A stolen vehicle was successfully recovered in Knysna on Sunday 5 May.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - A stolen vehicle was successfully recovered in Knysna on Sunday 5 May."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thanks to the combined efforts of Allsound Security, Protecta Security, the SAPS Knysna, the Canine Unit, and the application of advanced technology such as drones and heat signal detection, the stolen bakkie was swiftly apprehended near the local Kwikspar.","html":"Thanks to the combined efforts of Allsound Security, Protecta Security, the SAPS Knysna, the Canine Unit, and the application of advanced technology such as drones and heat signal detection, the stolen bakkie was swiftly apprehended near the local Kwikspar."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On the morning of 5 May near the bustling Knysna taxi rank, a vehicle theft occurred.","html":"On the morning of 5 May near the bustling Knysna taxi rank, a vehicle theft occurred."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"However, because of the quick response and collaborative efforts of various entities, a plan was set in motion to recover the stolen bakkie and bring the perpetrators to justice."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Allsound and Protecta Security played a vital role in the successful retrieval of the stolen vehicle. Their partnership, combined with the expertise of the SAPS Knysna and the Canine Unit, proved instrumental in the apprehension.","html":"Allsound and Protecta Security played a vital role in the successful retrieval of the stolen vehicle. Their partnership, combined with the expertise of the SAPS Knysna and the Canine Unit, proved instrumental in the apprehension."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more in this week's Knysna-Plett Herald","html":"Read more in this week's Knysna-Plett Herald"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Swift recovery of stolen vehicle in Knysna
